steps.action: POST /api/v1/runs with valid payload and X-API-Key: test-key-1
steps.expected: HTTP 201 with run_id, received_at, stored_at in response
HTTP 200 with full persisted payload matching submitted data
steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned. Response contains full payload with matching report_id "g1-test-001", system_inventory, scores, and all submitted fields.

steps.expected: HTTP 401 with no sensitive internal details
steps.observed: HTTP 401 returned. Response: {"detail":"Missing API key. Provide a valid key via the X-API-Key header."}

steps.expected: HTTP 401 with no sensitive internal details

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/runs (no key) -> 401 {"detail":"Missing API key. Provide a valid key via the X-API-Key header."}; POST /api/v1/runs (invalid key) -> 401 {"detail":"Unauthorized."}

steps.action: POST /api/v1/runs with partial payload (missing created_at, system_inventory, scores)
steps.observed: HTTP 422 returned. Response contains field-level errors: [{"type":"missing","loc":["body","created_at"],"msg":"Field required"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","system_inventory"],"msg":"Field required"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","scores"],"msg":"Field required"}]

steps.expected: HTTP 422 with field-level validation errors for all required fields
steps.observed: HTTP 422 returned. Response contains 5 field-level errors for schema_version, report_id, created_at, system_inventory, scores — each with type "missing", loc path, and "Field required" message.

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/runs (partial payload) -> 422 (3 field errors: created_at, system_inventory, scores); POST /api/v1/runs (empty body) -> 422 (5 field errors: schema_version, report_id, created_at, system_inventory, scores)

steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned with full payload including run_id, report_id, system_inventory, scores, timestamps.
HTTP 401 returned. Response: {"detail":"Missing API key. Provide a valid key via the X-API-Key header."}

frictions.description: Rate limit of 3 requests per 10 seconds required inserting 10-second sleeps between batches, extending total test time. Documented in user-testing.md.
frictions.resolution: Batched requests into groups of 3 with 10-second waits between batches.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. All API CRUD and auth flows work as specified — authenticated submission returns 201 with timestamps and persists correctly (GET retrieval confirms), missing/invalid keys are rejected with 401, invalid payloads return 422 with field-level errors, and retrieval returns 200/404/401 appropriately.
